meaning: adj.鍏夌潃鑴氱殑adv.鏈埓甯藉湴
examples: I hurried barefooted to the window.
Enjoying the view of barefooted girls.
"I couldn't run barefooted, or in Vibrams, even if I wanted to, " Hendrick said.
"Barefooted, swimming in dirty lakes, selling fruit, picking mango trees, hoping not to get caught because they don't take kindly to thieves in Africa, " he adds, laughing.
